title: p1kl's 3D Items
description: Revamp Minecraft with original 3D item models, now compatible with Hold My Items (HMI), Punchy!, and available for every version 1.21+! Thanks for 100,000 downloads!
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fed99af5918a5f94deb94ad3f2078e71f42de24_0.webp)
---
Revamp Minecraft with 3D items, now available for every version 1.21+! This pack transforms a variety of items to have unique 3D models, with the mission to eventually make every item 3D! 

<center>

![Title Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1d40c90f69f502f5a607b8e96ed19ba50bd5017_0.webp)

</center>

---

![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e158d061568616cf1e7a92d75d4197cc51274a85_0.webp)
---
Thanks to these guys for creating the following assets included in this pack!

> _Core Shaders by **[Tixul](https://modrinth.com/user/tixul)**_

Many parts of this pack are inspired by the following projects: 
> _Weskerson's 3D Items, MB-3D Items, the various Fresh 3D Items packs, Maddox's 3D Gear, and Actions & Stuff._

---

![Other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec32abbeb193f746878083f2a51759b7a61c96ba_0.webp)
---
While this pack does add 3D items, please note that the custom models do not show up in GUIs, Item Frames, or Shelves. 

However, this pack comes with a special feature that allows for every item to be 3D in item frames when renamed to its original name.

> _e.g. rename a Diamond Sword to "_Apple_", then rename it back to "_Diamond Sword_", and it will become 3D when placed in an Item Frame._

---

![Compat & Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56005d7c75c51c101cdf0c6d5d52d25417fc6118_0.webp)
---
As of the last few updates, this pack is now compatible with the following mods:

> _**[Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)** versions 5.0L1-5.1.1 for all available versions_
>
> _**[Punchy!](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa)** versions 2.3-2.4 for all available versions_
>
> _**[ResPackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)** to disable the tool, armor, and bucket models in this pack_

Backports for this pack go all the way to 1.21+, however some versions require mod dependencies:

> _Versions 1.21-1.21.3 require **[Modefite](https://modrinth.com/mod/modefite-item-definition-backport)**_
> 
> _Versions 1.21.1-1.21.10 require **[Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)**_

---

<center>

[![Join the Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c14ec343712e829617593926c7a6b359d3f8f48.png)](https://discord.gg/PtT2DPQ6Mf) 

</center>
